version_description: Need that A in the main riff and the D variations in the bridge.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] 
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  
                    woah![/tab]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] 
 
[Verse 1]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] 
There's every good reason       for letting you go[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]  
    She's sneaky and smoked out[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
    And it's starting to show[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
     I'll never let you go[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
     I'll never let you   go[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
     I'll never let you go[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
       I'll never let you turn around, your back on each other[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
That's a good idea, break a promise to your mother[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Turn around your back on each other[/tab]

[Break]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
    You say that I've changed        Well maybe I did[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
    But even if I changed          What's wrong with it[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]

[Bridge]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]D6[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]       [ch]D6[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
And all friends are gone and gone[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]      [ch]D6[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
And all the time moves on and on[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]        [ch]D6[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
And all I know is it's wrong, it's wrong[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]     [ch]D6[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]D6[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]

[Outro]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]             
I remember the stupid things, the mood rings, the bracelets and the beads[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
Nickels and dimes, yours and mine, did you cash in all your dreams[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]                                     [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
You don't dream for me, no, (goodbye, goodbye) you don't dream for me, no[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
But I still feel you pulse like sonar from the days in the waves[/tab]

That girl is like a sunburn I would like to say[/tab]
